resources.string: Please enter the URL to a special folder on your WebDAV server. My Expenses will store its data inside this folder, it won\'t touch anything outside of it.
The website uses a certificate, which is not trusted by Android.
The configured client certificate is no longer available on this device. Please reconfigure WebDAV and select a new certificate.
Could not access the client certificate. Please check if the certificate is still installed.
The certificate could not be trusted. It seems invalid.
The URL does not point to a WebDAV resource.
The URL does not exist on the server.
